channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Watch Slayyyter Showcase Anthemic Single ‘Dance’ on ‘Fallon’
item.description: Slayyyter bringing major energy with 'Dance' on Fallon! 💃🎤 Check out the performance now! 🚀 #Slayyyter #FallonTonight

item.title: Lido Pimienta announces new LP ‘Caribenya,’ shares “Tóxica”
item.description: 🌟 Dance your way into a tropical paradise with @LidoPimienta’s upcoming album ‘Caribenya’ and feel the heat with her latest single “Tóxica”! 🔥🌴 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Sweet Pill announce rescheduled tour
item.description: Get your dancing shoes ready! 🎶 Sweet Pill drops new tour dates like it's hot! 💃 #SweetPillTour #RescheduledVibes

item.title: Future Islands livestreaming Cat’s Cradle show on Veeps ahead of new release
item.description: 🌟 Join the party! 🎉 Future Islands set to rock your screens with a live show on Veeps before dropping their new music! 🎶 #FutureIslands #LivestreamConcert

item.title: Moses Sumney Announces IS GOD IS Soundtrack Out Friday: Hear “Sins Of The Father” (Feat. Kara Jackson)
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the sonic world of Moses Sumney with “Sins Of The Father” featuring Kara Jackson! 🎧 #NewMusicFriday #MosesSumney #ISGODIS 🎵
